notes: Visual cleanup batch — three fixes, no functional surface touched. (1) Resume banner no longer overlaps the boot subtitle: body.has-resume-banner toggles a #boot padding-top override; class is added when the banner mounts and cleared on every boot-exit path (Start Fresh / Resume auto-dismiss / Enter Phantom) so no stale layout shift survives the splash. (2) Boot subtitle is now dynamic — bound to PHANTOM_APP_VERSION at DOMContentLoaded, reads as 'CoreWeave · AUS-01 · v1.6.31' and updates automatically on every future bump. Replaces the stale hardcoded 'v1.4.2' that had drifted 26+ patch releases. (3) Desktop layout: @media (min-width: 600px) clamps #app and the viewport-anchored fixed siblings (.tab-nav, #action-stripe, #omni-bar) to a centered 480px column so PHANTOM no longer stretches across full browser width during Lenovo dev. iPhone PWA is byte-identical — breakpoint is safely above any handheld portrait width. No changes to phantom_parseMaster, PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE, boot-restore IIFE, EDP/BOM, deploy_*, Ghost Echo, PIN gating, or the v1.6.30 MASTER tab logic. SW cache bumped together.
